candidates.why: Pure D&A label exists in the operating section, but the visible populated operating D&A line is actually 'Depreciation and impairment', which mixes depreciation with impairment and should be ignored for this task. No clean separate COGS-specific D&A row is visible that should be added relative to the selected COGS rows.
This is a visible separate operating line, but it combines depreciation with impairment. Per instructions, impairment rows should be ignored, so it should not be selected as a D&A add-back row.

variables.notes: Selected COGS reference bucket is Voyage Related Expenses + Procurement Expenses. No clean separate COGS-only depreciation/amortisation row is visible above finance lines. The only populated D&A-like line is mixed with impairment, so conservative output is empty to avoid distortion/double counting.

candidates.why: Pure D&A label exists in the operating section, but no populated SG&A-specific depreciation/amortisation row is shown. The visible populated line is 'Depreciation and impairment', which mixes D&A with impairment and should be ignored.
Although this appears as a separate operating expense line, it includes impairment and is therefore out of scope for a clean D&A add-back selection.
